case_title: BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING VS. ANTHONY TSE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TSE, ANTHONY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSE, ANTHONY $28,848.17 PRINCIPAL, $1,750.00 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,968.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
